sizing_rule.note: Position sizing at 100% optimal kelly fraction where AHPR/SD ratio is maximized (AHPR=1.0300, SD=0.02986). Locate peak on Efficient Frontier by varying position sizes and apply allocation corresponding to optimal point.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be determined by locating the optimal point on the Efficient Frontier where the ratio of AHPR to Standard Deviation is maximized, with the peak occurring at approximately 100% of optimal kelly fraction (AHPR of 1.0300 with SD of 0.02986).
